\tzpentry{ID5669}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5669 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ B_{\mathrm{bnd}}(\theta,\phi,t) = B_0\,\mathrm{sgn}\bigl(\sin(n_\theta\theta)\sin(n_\phi\phi)\bigr)\,e^{i\omega t}\,\hat r, \]
